hook: Playfulness lands best when both people feel safe enough to join it.
body: Without enough ease, playful tension can feel like strain instead of spark.

hook: Men sometimes try to create charge before the interaction has enough warmth to hold it.
body: Build comfort first, then add edge in small, responsive doses.

hook: Build comfort first, then add edge in small, responsive doses.
body: A teasing comment works better after shared laughter than as the opening move in a cold room.

hook: A teasing comment works better after shared laughter than as the opening move in a cold room.
body: Earn the right to play by establishing warmth before you escalate tone.
